creator: amontalban@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171883
Update MASTER_SITES for x11-fonts/webfonts

Hi,

The following URLs does not seem to work:

http://download.microsoft.com/download/ie6sp1/finrel/6_sp1/W98NT42KMeXP/EN-US/ielpkth.cab

http://distcache.freebsd.org/ports-distfiles/webfonts/ielpkth.cab

So I had to search over Internet to find the file and decided to make a repository in GitHub for prosperity.

The repo is in https://github.com/amontalban/mscorefonts and contains all files needed by this package.

Thanks!
